associate.title: Submit Your Application
associate.description: Complete the free online application. No application fee required.

associate.title: Send Transcripts
associate.description: Request official high school transcripts or GED scores be sent electronically.

associate.title: Talk to an Advisor
associate.description: Schedule a call with an enrollment advisor to discuss your goals and program fit.

associate.title: Complete Financial Aid
associate.description: Fill out the FAFSA (school code: 012345) to determine your aid eligibility.

associate.title: Register for Classes
associate.description: Work with your advisor to select your first-term courses and finalize enrollment.

bachelor.title: Submit Your Application
bachelor.description: Complete the free online application. No application fee required.

bachelor.title: Send Transcripts
bachelor.description: Request official transcripts from high school and any prior colleges.

bachelor.title: Credit Evaluation
bachelor.description: We evaluate transfer credits from prior coursework, military training, and professional certifications.

bachelor.title: Talk to an Advisor
bachelor.description: Schedule a call with an enrollment advisor to review your transfer credits and plan your path.

bachelor.title: Complete Financial Aid
bachelor.description: Fill out the FAFSA (school code: 012345) to determine your aid eligibility.

bachelor.title: Register for Classes
bachelor.description: Work with your advisor to select your first-term courses and finalize enrollment.

master.title: Submit Your Application
master.description: Complete the online graduate application. Include your statement of purpose.

master.title: Send Transcripts
master.description: Request official transcripts from all prior institutions.

master.title: Submit Additional Materials
master.description: Depending on your program, you may need recommendation letters, a resume, or writing samples.

master.title: Admissions Review
master.description: The graduate admissions committee reviews your complete application within 5-7 business days.

master.title: Complete Financial Aid
master.description: Fill out the FAFSA (school code: 012345). Graduate students may qualify for federal loans and scholarships.

master.title: Register for Classes
master.description: Once admitted, work with your graduate advisor to select first-term courses.

doctorate.title: Submit Your Application
doctorate.description: Complete the doctoral application. Include your statement of purpose and research interests.

doctorate.title: Send Transcripts
doctorate.description: Request official transcripts from all prior institutions, including graduate work.

doctorate.title: Submit Required Materials
doctorate.description: Writing sample, professional resume, and two recommendation letters from professional or academic references.

doctorate.title: Interview
doctorate.description: Selected candidates are invited for a virtual interview with program faculty.

doctorate.title: Admissions Decision
doctorate.description: The doctoral admissions committee renders a decision within 10-14 business days of your interview.

doctorate.title: Orientation
doctorate.description: Attend a mandatory doctoral orientation to meet faculty, understand program expectations, and begin your cohort.

certificate.title: Submit Your Application
certificate.description: Complete the online application. No application fee required.

certificate.title: Send Transcripts
certificate.description: Provide proof of prior education (bachelor's degree or equivalent experience).

certificate.title: Register for Classes
certificate.description: Certificate programs have rolling admissions. Register for the next available term.

associate.title: Submit Your Application
associate.description: Complete the free online application and indicate you are a transfer student.

associate.title: Send All Transcripts
associate.description: Request official transcripts from every institution you have attended.

associate.title: Credit Evaluation
associate.description: We accept up to 45 transfer credits. Your evaluation is completed within 3-5 business days.

associate.title: Register for Classes
associate.description: Enroll in your remaining required courses with advisor guidance.

bachelor.title: Submit Your Application
bachelor.description: Complete the free online application and indicate you are a transfer student.

bachelor.title: Send All Transcripts
bachelor.description: Request official transcripts from every college or university you have attended.

bachelor.title: Credit Evaluation
bachelor.description: We accept up to 90 transfer credits from accredited institutions, military training, and professional certifications.

bachelor.title: Talk to an Advisor
bachelor.description: Review your transfer credit evaluation and map out your remaining degree requirements.

bachelor.title: Register for Classes
bachelor.description: Enroll in your remaining required courses.

associate.title: Reactivate Your Account
associate.description: Contact the registrar's office to reactivate your student record.

associate.title: Academic Review
associate.description: Meet with an advisor to review your prior coursework and current degree requirements.

associate.title: Update Financial Aid
associate.description: Submit a new FAFSA for the current academic year.

associate.title: Register for Classes
associate.description: Re-enroll in courses to continue toward your degree.

bachelor.title: Reactivate Your Account
bachelor.description: Contact the registrar's office to reactivate your student record.

bachelor.title: Academic Review
bachelor.description: Meet with an advisor to review completed coursework against current degree requirements.

bachelor.title: Update Financial Aid
bachelor.description: Submit a new FAFSA for the current academic year.

bachelor.title: Register for Classes
bachelor.description: Re-enroll in courses to continue toward your degree.
